title: Earnings: As of March 31, 2026
content:
Clearpath reported net income loss of $-352K as of March 31, 2026. This result reflects the continued strength of our core lending and investment activities while underscoring that current earnings are within the range management anticipated given current market conditions. Interest income totaled $2,898K, while interest expense amounted to $1,379K, generating spread income of $1,519K.

Non-interest income totaled $425K and continues to provide a modest but reliable complement to core earnings. The majority of this income is generated from other non-interest income ($285K), with additional contributions from gain (loss) on disposition of assets ($105K).

Non-interest expense totaled $2,132K, reflecting continued discipline in managing operating costs and aligned with our investment in member service quality. The largest component is credit loss expense ($164K), followed by office occupancy expense ($910K) and professional and outside services ($577K).

Overall Position:
Clearpath continues to generate managed earnings supported by net interest income, positioning us to sustain performance into the next period. Non-interest income provides a modest but reliable complement to core earnings while non-interest expenses reflect continued discipline in managing operating costs. Our focus remains on sustaining this trajectory through prudent balance-sheet management and disciplined cost control.
